calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported. (Dept. 304-B).
Appearances:
Susan Parkinson, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Terence Lee.
Jeremy Reyes, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant Ernesto C. Medina.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.
Case settled, "Stipulation for Entry of Judgment and Settlement Agreement" singed by the parties, filed in court, but not read into the record.
TRIAL DATE VACATED.
